_meta.name: lisbon-opening-night
_meta.description: Tuned during installation on 6/4 opening day. Settled threshold after addressing strobe→camera feedback loop. extension_or_velocity at 0.65 — high enough that strobe-induced keypoint jitter does not retrigger CV7, low enough that deliberate gesture still fires.
_meta.movement_source_choice: arm extension (top-down friendly) OR pose velocity (catches fast waves) — max of the two drives CV7. Threshold 0.65 chosen empirically to break the strobe/camera/glitch feedback loop without killing real gesture detection.
